file_insights.changes: Added session 2-5 documentation (sessions 2-4 were prior work; session 5 documents verification results)
file_insights.significance: Tracks implementation progress across 5 coding sessions for event-driven dispatcher refactor
Marks completion of dispatcher event-driven refactor, merge_gate refactor, release profile optimization, and verification phases

patterns_discovered.name: Event-driven watcher pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Replaced polling loops with notify-debouncer-mini watchers (100ms debounce) + tokio::sync::mpsc channels
variants: Multiple watchers on flat and team-based done/ directories (merge_gate)

patterns_discovered.name: Async multiplexing
patterns_discovered.description: Uses tokio::select! to multiplex filesystem events against timer intervals (reaper in dispatcher)
patterns_discovered.reusability: High - applicable to any async event handling requiring multiple concurrent sources

patterns_discovered.name: Thread + channel bridge
patterns_discovered.description: Watchers spawned in separate OS threads to avoid blocking async runtime; events sent via tokio channels
patterns_discovered.rationale: notify-debouncer-mini requires blocking thread; channels decouple from async context

patterns_discovered.name: API compatibility maintenance
patterns_discovered.description: Kept poll_ms parameter but renamed to _poll_ms when no longer used (not removed)
patterns_discovered.purpose: Preserves function signature for backward compatibility

gotchas_discovered.description: opt-level value must be unquoted integer (3) not string ("3") in release profile
gotchas_discovered.impact: Type mismatch causes parse error; discovered in subtask-4-1

gotchas_discovered.description: notify watcher operations block; cannot run directly in tokio async context
gotchas_discovered.impact: Would cause executor to hang if watcher spawned on async task
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Spawned watcher in std::thread with channel communication

gotchas_discovered.description: Must watch both flat (.cards/done/) and team-based (.cards/team-*/done/) directories
gotchas_discovered.impact: Missed events if only one watcher set up; implementation required collecting all directories first

approach_outcome.completion_summary: All 5 subtasks completed across event-driven refactor (phases 2-5)
approach_outcome.reason_no_changes: All implementations from prior sessions passed verification; no fixes needed

recommendations.action: Execute subtask-5-2: Write output/result.md with latency measurements
recommendations.context: Verification phase complete; measurement documentation needed for project closure

recommendations.action: Consider watcher pattern as library pattern for future bop filesystem monitors
recommendations.context: notify-debouncer-mini + tokio channel bridge is reusable across project; successful in dispatcher and merge_gate

recommendations.action: Document thread-safety guarantees of notify watcher thread spawning
recommendations.context: Pattern works but thread lifecycle (watcher thread outlives main thread during --once mode) should be explicitly verified

recommendations.action: Monitor release binary performance under Wave 5 load tests
recommendations.context: opt-level=3 + lto=thin optimization applied; actual latency improvement vs. previous builds unknown without benchmarking
